creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could the problem result from a combination of the following two commits?
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/Mk/bsd.gcc.mk.diff?r1=1.47;r2=1.48;sortby=date;f=h
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk.diff?r1=1.650;r2=1.651;sortby=date;f=h

It seems that before the above changes something else could have been used in
place of 'cpp' during gcc 4.4 build and any possible bug with finding external
iconv.h was not exposed.

-- 
Andriy Gapon
